topic: ACL main Limitations page-8 coordinate-scoring boundary polish

before_text_matches: page 8 line 392: Qwen2.5-VL also leaves coordinate semantics
page 8 line 393: unresolved because raw image-space scoring is
page 8 line 394: stronger than the requested normalized-1000
defect.reader_effect: The wording named the right limitation but made a coordinate-semantics mismatch sound like an evaluation preference.

changes.summary: Changed the coordinate-semantics limitation to say raw image-space and normalized-1000 scores disagree.
Shortened the preceding clean-pool limitation to avoid column-boundary orphan text after the accepted rewrite.
Protected Qwen2.5-VL with mbox in source so the rendered model name does not split.

rejected_iterations.summary: The first rewrite introduced visible page-8 hyphenation: Qwen2.5- / VL, unre- / solved, can- / not, and ground- / ing.
The second rewrite protected the model name and shortened the coordinate sentence, but still left can- / not at the page-8 column boundary.
The third rewrite removed linebreak hyphenation but left a right-column opener that began with the isolated word claim.

after_evidence.targeted_scan_result: Page 8 shows broad VLM grounding claims followed by the 30-pair stress-set limitation and the revised coordinate-use sentence.
after_evidence.full_scan_result: The accepted after text scan reports no line-end hyphenation candidates in the extracted page text.
after_evidence.visual_result: The page-8 Limitations paragraph, adjacent Discussion and Conclusion text, and right-column paragraph start remain visually stable.

claim_boundary: Limitations prose only. No metrics, evidence pools, figures, tables, citations, metadata, or supported/forbidden claim scopes were changed.
residual_risk: This round did not re-audit figure content or references beyond the line-end scan and targeted page-8 visual review.
